endpoints.name: GET /district/{district_key}/events
endpoints.description: Gets a list of events in the given district.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{DISTRICT_KEY}} with a real district_key.

endpoints.name: GET /district/{district_key}/events/keys
endpoints.description: Gets a list of event keys for events in the given district.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{DISTRICT_KEY}} with a real district_key.

endpoints.name: GET /district/{district_key}/events/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a short-form list of events in the given district.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{DISTRICT_KEY}} with a real district_key.

endpoints.name: GET /district/{district_key}/rankings
endpoints.description: Gets a list of team district rankings for the given district.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{DISTRICT_KEY}} with a real district_key.

endpoints.name: GET /district/{district_key}/teams
endpoints.description: Gets a list of `Team` objects that competed in events in the given district.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{DISTRICT_KEY}} with a real district_key.

endpoints.name: GET /district/{district_key}/teams/keys
endpoints.description: Gets a list of `Team` objects that competed in events in the given district.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{DISTRICT_KEY}} with a real district_key.

endpoints.name: GET /district/{district_key}/teams/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a short-form list of `Team` objects that competed in events in the given district.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{DISTRICT_KEY}} with a real district_key.

endpoints.name: GET /districts/{year}
endpoints.description: Gets a list of districts and their corresponding district key, for the given year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}
endpoints.description: Gets an Event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/alliances
endpoints.description: Gets a list of Elimination Alliances for the given Event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/awards
endpoints.description: Gets a list of awards from the given event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/district_points
endpoints.description: Gets a list of team rankings for the Event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/insights
endpoints.description: Gets a set of Event-specific insights for the given Event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/matches
endpoints.description: Gets a list of matches for the given event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/matches/keys
endpoints.description: Gets a list of match keys for the given event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/matches/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a short-form list of matches for the given event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/matches/timeseries
endpoints.description:
Gets an array of Match Keys for the given event key that have timeseries data. Returns an empty array if no matches have timeseries data.
*WARNING:* This is *not* official data, and is subject to a significant possibility of error, or missing data. Do not rely on this data for any purpose. In fact, pretend we made it up.
*WARNING:* This endpoint and corresponding data models are under *active development* and may change at any time, including in breaking ways.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/oprs
endpoints.description: Gets a set of Event OPRs (including OPR, DPR, and CCWM) for the given Event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/predictions
endpoints.description: Gets information on TBA-generated predictions for the given Event. Contains year-specific information. *WARNING* This endpoint is currently under development and may change at any time.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/rankings
endpoints.description: Gets a list of team rankings for the Event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a short-form Event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/teams
endpoints.description: Gets a list of `Team` objects that competed in the given event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/teams/keys
endpoints.description: Gets a list of `Team` keys that competed in the given event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/teams/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a short-form list of `Team` objects that competed in the given event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /event/{event_key}/teams/statuses
endpoints.description: Gets a key-value list of the event statuses for teams competing at the given event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /events/{year}
endpoints.description: Gets a list of events in the given year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /events/{year}/keys
endpoints.description: Gets a list of event keys in the given year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /events/{year}/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a short-form list of events in the given year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /match/{match_key}
endpoints.description: Gets a `Match` object for the given match key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{MATCH_KEY}} with a real match_key.

endpoints.name: GET /match/{match_key}/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a short-form `Match` object for the given match key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{MATCH_KEY}} with a real match_key.

endpoints.name: GET /match/{match_key}/timeseries
endpoints.description:
Gets an array of game-specific Match Timeseries objects for the given match key or an empty array if not available.
*WARNING:* This is *not* official data, and is subject to a significant possibility of error, or missing data. Do not rely on this data for any purpose. In fact, pretend we made it up.
*WARNING:* This endpoint and corresponding data models are under *active development* and may change at any time, including in breaking ways.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{MATCH_KEY}} with a real match_key.

endpoints.name: GET /match/{match_key}/zebra_motionworks
endpoints.description: Gets Zebra MotionWorks data for a Match for the given match key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{MATCH_KEY}} with a real match_key.

endpoints.name: GET /status
endpoints.description: Returns API status, and TBA status information.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}
endpoints.description: Gets a `Team` object for the team referenced by the given key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/awards
endpoints.description: Gets a list of awards the given team has won.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/awards/{year}
endpoints.description: Gets a list of awards the given team has won in a given year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/districts
endpoints.description: Gets an array of districts representing each year the team was in a district. Will return an empty array if the team was never in a district.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/event/{event_key}/awards
endpoints.description: Gets a list of awards the given team won at the given event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/event/{event_key}/matches
endpoints.description: Gets a list of matches for the given team and event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/event/{event_key}/matches/keys
endpoints.description: Gets a list of match keys for matches for the given team and event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/event/{event_key}/matches/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a short-form list of matches for the given team and event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/event/{event_key}/status
endpoints.description: Gets the competition rank and status of the team at the given event.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{EVENT_KEY}} with a real event_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/events
endpoints.description: Gets a list of all events this team has competed at.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/events/keys
endpoints.description: Gets a list of the event keys for all events this team has competed at.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/events/simple

endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/events/{year}
endpoints.description: Gets a list of events this team has competed at in the given year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/events/{year}/keys
endpoints.description: Gets a list of the event keys for events this team has competed at in the given year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/events/{year}/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a short-form list of events this team has competed at in the given year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/events/{year}/statuses
endpoints.description: Gets a key-value list of the event statuses for events this team has competed at in the given year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/matches/{year}
endpoints.description: Gets a list of matches for the given team and year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/matches/{year}/keys
endpoints.description: Gets a list of match keys for matches for the given team and year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/matches/{year}/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a short-form list of matches for the given team and year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/media/tag/{media_tag}
endpoints.description: Gets a list of Media (videos / pictures) for the given team and tag.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{MEDIA_TAG}} with a real media_tag.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/media/tag/{media_tag}/{year}
endpoints.description: Gets a list of Media (videos / pictures) for the given team, tag and year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{MEDIA_TAG}} with a real media_tag. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/media/{year}
endpoints.description: Gets a list of Media (videos / pictures) for the given team and year.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/robots
endpoints.description: Gets a list of year and robot name pairs for each year that a robot name was provided. Will return an empty array if the team has never named a robot.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a `Team_Simple` object for the team referenced by the given key.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/social_media
endpoints.description: Gets a list of Media (social media) for the given team.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key.

endpoints.name: GET /team/{team_key}/years_participated
endpoints.description: Gets a list of years in which the team participated in at least one competition.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{TEAM_KEY}} with a real team_key.

endpoints.name: GET /teams/{page_num}
endpoints.description: Gets a list of `Team` objects, paginated in groups of 500.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{PAGE_NUM}} with a real page_num.

endpoints.name: GET /teams/{page_num}/keys
endpoints.description: Gets a list of Team keys, paginated in groups of 500. (Note, each page will not have 500 teams, but will include the teams within that range of 500.)
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{PAGE_NUM}} with a real page_num.

endpoints.name: GET /teams/{page_num}/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a list of short form `Team_Simple` objects, paginated in groups of 500.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{PAGE_NUM}} with a real page_num.

endpoints.name: GET /teams/{year}/{page_num}
endpoints.description: Gets a list of `Team` objects that competed in the given year, paginated in groups of 500.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{PAGE_NUM}} with a real page_num. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /teams/{year}/{page_num}/keys
endpoints.description: Gets a list Team Keys that competed in the given year, paginated in groups of 500.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{PAGE_NUM}} with a real page_num. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.

endpoints.name: GET /teams/{year}/{page_num}/simple
endpoints.description: Gets a list of short form `Team_Simple` objects that competed in the given year, paginated in groups of 500.
endpoints.notes: Replace {{THEBLUEALLIANCE_API_KEY}} with your THEBLUEALLIANCE API KEY. Replace {{PAGE_NUM}} with a real page_num. Replace {{YEAR}} with a real year.
